settings.languageDesc: Select the interface language. / Выберите язык интерфейса.
settings.textSeparatorDesc: How accumulated report text is joined between nodes. "newline" adds a line break before each new chunk; "space" adds a single space.
settings.protocolFolderDesc: Vault-relative folder containing your .canvas protocol files. The canvas selector in the runner panel scans this folder. Leave empty to disable the selector.
settings.snippetFolderDesc: Vault-relative path for snippet JSON files. Default: .radiprotocol/snippets
settings.sessionFolderDesc: Vault-relative path for session JSON files. Default: .radiprotocol/sessions
settings.libraryUrlDesc: URL of the external snippet library index JSON. Leave empty to disable.

donate.invitation: Thank you for your support! If RadiProtocol saves you time, any donation is appreciated.

snippetEditor.name: Name
snippetEditor.unsavedBody: Changes to snippet «{name}» were not saved. What would you like to do?
snippetEditor.collisionError: A file with this name already exists in this folder.
snippetEditor.collisionTitle: Resolve the name conflict before saving.
snippetEditor.validationLockTitle: Snippet has an error — fix the source and reopen.

snippetManager.redrawError: Failed to refresh the snippet list. See console for details.
snippetManager.subfolderInvalidName: Subfolder name must not contain «/», «\», «.» or «..».
snippetManager.deleteSnippetBody: Snippet «{name}» will be moved to Obsidian trash. You can restore it via your system file manager.
snippetManager.emptyFolderBody: The folder is empty and will be moved to trash.
snippetManager.folderItemsBody: The folder contains {count} items. All will be moved to trash:
snippetManager.moveSelfError: Cannot move a folder into itself.
snippetManager.moveSelfDescendantError: Cannot move into a subfolder of itself.
snippetManager.invalidTargetError: This folder is not available as a move target.
snippetManager.emptyStateBody: Create your first snippet to insert text fragments while running protocols.

snippetForm.targetDesc: Choose a folder (the node will offer all its snippets) or a specific snippet file. Folder and file are mutually exclusive (D-01).

snippetModel.legacyTypeError: Placeholder "{id}" uses removed type "{type}". Recreate the placeholder manually — automatic migration is not performed.
snippetModel.invalidChoiceError: Placeholder "{id}" of type "choice" has no options. Add options or delete the placeholder.

snippetService.invalidName: Name cannot be empty and must not contain «/» or «\».

canvasParser.legacyFreeTextInput: Node "{id}" uses the deprecated type "free-text-input". This type was removed. Replace the node with question or text-block and rebuild the branch manually.

graphValidator.legacyLoopNodes: Canvas contains deprecated loop-start/loop-end nodes: {ids}. Rebuild the loop with a unified loop node: an «exit» label on one of the outgoing edges marks the exit branch; the rest form the loop body.
graphValidator.loopNoExit: Loop node "{label}" has no exit. Mark exactly one outgoing edge with a "+" prefix — the text after "+" becomes the exit-button caption.
graphValidator.loopNoExitWithLegacy: Loop node "{label}" has no exit edge with a "+" prefix. Add "+" to one of the labeled edges ({ids}) — the text after "+" becomes the exit-button caption.
graphValidator.loopMultipleExits: Loop node "{label}" has multiple "+" edges: {ids}. Exactly one exit edge is required — remove "+" from the others.
graphValidator.loopExitNoLabel: Loop node "{label}": "+" edge {edgeId} has no caption — add text after "+".
graphValidator.loopNoBody: Loop node "{label}" has no body — add an outgoing edge without a "+" prefix.
graphValidator.snippetFileMissing: Snippet node "{label}" references a missing file "{relPath}" — file not found in {folder}. Check the path or restore the file.

protocolRunner.legacyLoopRuntime: Encountered a deprecated loop-start/loop-end node. The canvas should have been rejected by the validator; if you see this message, this is a bug — please contact the plugin author.

library.title: Snippet Library
library.noUrl: Library URL is not configured. Set it in plugin settings.
library.loadError: Failed to load library index. Check the URL and your network connection.
library.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and the library URL.
